I think: This is making a very big promise, so I am looking for proof before I let myself get excited.
My reaction: I like the clarity of the offer, but phrases like complete school replacement make me cautious.
Idea: Show a real sample week for one child, including mentor support, parent oversight, and limits of the AI.
Life-cost decision: Spending 1 month(s) to explore is acceptable only because finding a trustworthy education option could meaningfully help my family.
Truth assessment: My honest judgment is that Self Degree looks interesting but not yet credible enough for a serious family decision; confidence 0.74.
